ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Block ID for grouping related experiments together */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row position of the experiment */,
  "col" INTEGER /* Column position of the experiment */,
  "response" REAL /* Resulting response of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_class" TEXT /* Class of the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug the concentration belongs to */,
  "concentration_value" REAL /* Value of the concentration */,
  "concentration_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the concentration (e.g., uM) */,
  "concentration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug combination */,
  "drug1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first drug in the combination */,
  "drug2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second drug in the combination */,
  "combination_effect" TEXT /* Observed effect of the combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_combinations_drug1_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug1_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_combinations_drug2_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug2_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_drugs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug used in the experiment */,
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concentration of the drug used */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row position of the drug in the experiment */,
  "col" INTEGER /* Column position of the drug in the experiment */,
  "dose_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_drugs_concentration_id FOREIGN KEY ("concentration_id") REFERENCES concentrations ("concentration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., mean, median) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., plot, chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)
